pages.text:
§2§lANCIENT TREE
    CODEX§r

§7§oThe roots remember
what hands forget.
Herein lie the shapes
of creation...§r

§8— The Nymph

§2§lThe Waystone§r

§7§oFour stones that
find what is lost,
alternating with the
darkest metal's cost.

A fallen star rests
at the heart of all,
and from this anchor
worlds may call.§r

§2§lColors of the Path§r

§7§oA waystone shaped
may yet be painted.
The hue of sky,
of leaves, of sunset,
or of blood.

Simply wed the stone
to the color of
your choosing.
No table required.§r

§2§lThe World Spinner§r

§7§oThe darkest metal
six times placed,
two wheels of time
above embraced.

Between them, a needle
that points to death.
Below, a frame
of netherite breath.

§8Bind it to stone
that pulls the lost.§r

§2§lThe Timekeeper§r

§7§oFour bars of ancient
metal, four faces
that tell the hour.

A diamond shape of
darkness and time,
with a dying star
burning at its core.

§8It hears the ruins
breathing.§r

§2§lThe Sleeping Giant§r

§7§oEight walls of the
densest dark, forged
into solid blocks.

Within this cage
of compressed might,
a beam of infinite
light waits unawoken.

§8Feed it more of
its own kind to grow.§r

§2§lThe Sweet Machine§r

§7§oFour walls of wax
built by the bees,
and one bar of
sunlit metal between.

A cross of honey
around gold's gleam.
Knowledge flows from
nature's cream.§r

§2§lThe Beast's Delight§r

§7§oCarrots blessed by
Midas at each corner.
Sweet nectar above
and below the center.

Bones of the earth
flank a crystal heart.
Four treats emerge
from this culinary art.§r

§2§lThe Binder of Souls§r

§7§oA treasure from the
deepest sea, paired
with fortune's foot.

Crying stone beside
a mountain's call.
Two by two, compact
and small.

§8A ledger for those
who walk beside you.§r

§8§o


  The tree remembers.

  Craft wisely,
  traveler.


        §2— N§r
